subject: docs(audit): fix documentation discrepancies and add decision documentation comments
body:
Full codebase audit found CLAUDE.md had stale counts and missing entries.
Fixed layout presets (20→27), platforms (14→20), overlays (20+→26), added
missing components to Architecture section, added STYLE_GUIDE.md to docs
section, removed dead EXTRACTION_PLAYBOOK.md reference, and completed Key
State Structure with missing fields. Added decision documentation comments
(requirement/approach/alternatives format) to 7 major files that were
non-compliant with Code Standards.

Tags: docs, audit, code-standards, comments
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-accuracy
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Bhd5s3EiYZRUN5zE4c9dMt
title: fix documentation discrepancies and add decision documentation comments
